title: pkg/machine: make mount units hook into local-fs
body:
The virtiofs mount points do not actually are network mounts so we can mount them earlier and using multi-user.target to enable them was wrong.



#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--

-->

```release-note
None
```

Added no new tests as the existing tests will cover it. Also while it works today with FCOS the way it worked is more accidental as remote-fs is activated by other units and not ours. Using local-fs is more reliable as this should always run in all contexts.
